title: CalVer migration
capability: migrate an integration off the renamed legacy resources and onto the current dated API
persona_ref: OPPORTUNITIES.md #4 (entities/assets renamed to taxpayers/locations/organizations); NOTES.md current contract

traps.detail: the client pins X-Api-Version 2025-08-12 and provisions via the pre-rename /entities and /assets resources, which look authoritative
traps.correct: pin the current 2026-02-03 version and use the current resources (/organizations, /taxpayers, /locations, /systems)
